description_long: This is a medium-sized, round metal bowl with a weathered, mottled surface showing signs of oxidation and patina, giving it a rustic, aged appearance. The bowl features two robust, horizontally aligned handles on opposite sides, each seamlessly integrated into the body for easy gripping. The interior is a darker, more uniform brown, while the exterior displays a mix of beige, brown, and gray tones with irregular patches and streaks. The rim is slightly thickened, providing structural strength and a subtle visual accent. The base is flat and slightly recessed, ensuring stability when placed on flat surfaces. The overall form and finish suggest it is a utilitarian object, likely used for serving or holding food in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A weathered metal bowl with two sturdy side handles and a mottled, rustic finish in earthy tones. The bowl has a flat base and a thickened rim, giving it a robust, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing both side handles and the full open mouth of the bowl, highlighting the mottled exterior and dark interior.
description_view_1: Side view with one handle visible and the other obscured, emphasizing the bowl's rounded profile and the handle's attachment.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying both handles and the bowl's depth, with clear visibility of the weathered surface texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other handle and the bowl's continuous, aged finish.
attribute_location: kitchen or outdoor urban food stall
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food, ingredients, or liquids
